name: Paigo
description: Paigo — Usage-based billing infrastructure for AI and API products with metering and subscription management.

seo.title: Paigo — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Paigo: Paigo — Usage-based billing infrastructure for AI and API products with metering and subscription management.

when_to_use: Implementing usage-based billing for AI API products
Metering and billing LLM token consumption per customer
Building tiered pricing plans for developer tools with API quotas
Automating invoice generation based on AI usage metrics

pros: Usage-based billing built for AI products
Token and compute metering out of the box
cons: Migration cost if you already use Stripe Billing
review.verdict: Useful if you ship AI SaaS with token-based pricing, but test Orb and Lago before committing.
review.best_for: AI SaaS startups launching usage-based or hybrid billing
review.not_for: Flat-rate SaaS with simple Stripe Billing already working

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
